title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 490.350 - Copies of recorded instruments
text:
490.350.  Copies of recorded instruments. — Certified copies of such records as are contemplated in section 490.340 shall not be received in evidence until the execution of the original instrument or instruments from which such records are made has been duly proved according to law, except where the record has been made thirty years or more prior to the time of offering the certified copies in evidence.
(RSMo 1939 § 1846, A.L. 1959 S.B. 113) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1682; 1919 § 5369; 1909 § 6314
